scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.minify:css: npx csso style.css -o style.min.css && npx csso features.css -o features.min.css
scripts.minify:js: npx uglify-js app.js -o app.min.js && npx uglify-js features.js -o features.min.js
scripts.optimize: npm run build && echo '✓ CSS & JS minified!'
